title: AI Trading Agents Achieve Up to 188% Annualized Returns with Real-Time Signals
author: tickeron_community
selftext: **Los Angeles, CA – September 8, 2025** – [Tickeron](https://tickeron.com/bot-stock-trading/), a leading innovator in AI-driven financial technology, proudly announces the exceptional performance of its [AI Trading Agents](https://tickeron.com/bot-stock-trading/), delivering annualized returns of up to 188% on a 5-minute timeframe. Powered by advanced Financial Learning Models (FLMs), these agents provide real-time trading signals, automated risk management, and customizable balances, transforming stock trading for beginners and seasoned investors alike.
